title: Why isn't this simple automation able to be created?
excerpt: Trying to make a simple automation that just adds todays date to the “Date Created” column so we know when its been created.

posts.author: DerekEmpathyFirm (DerekEmpathyFirm)
posts.cookedHtml:
Trying to make a simple automation that just adds todays date to the “Date Created” column so we know when its been created.

Screen Shot 2023-02-24 at 5.41.16 PM2288×1202 117 KB

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @DerekEmpathyFirm - this automation is available but limited due to the plan you are on. As a workaround, you can also add the Creation Log column to your board to know when and who added an item.

Thanks!
Mark
